prompt: gera um PDF de pilha (LIFO) — implementação em C, push/pop/peek, com questões de código no simulado tipo completar a função

assertions.text: PDF file was generated and has more than 1 page
PDF contains push, pop, and peek functions in C code
PDF contains an ASCII stack diagram (TOP arrow or vertical stack representation)
Simulado contains at least one code-completion question
PDF contains a GABARITO section with commented answers
PDF explicitly explains LIFO principle (Last In, First Out)
